description: Phase parent for the seven-phase cli-devin prompt-quality arc: 001 council design / 002 eval rig / 003 eval loop / 004 skill uplift / 005 extraction rerun + v3 mutation confirmation / 006 cross-CLI RCAF propagation / 007 cross-model validation on deepseek-v4-pro + kimi-k2.6. Result: cli-devin v1.0.5.0 → v1.0.6.1 with RCAF + medium + standard + standard validated on three measured models; sk-prompt master + 4 sibling cards propagated with bundle-gate + anti-hallucination composition guidance.
